name: Lamb w/ Yoghurt, Coconut Milk & Almond Masala (Badami Gos
recipeInstructions:
1. Cube 2 lb of lamb and prepare 1/2 cup of unsalted almonds.
2. In a small bowl or cup, drop the saffron threads and add 1/3 of the boiling water. Soak for at least 10 minutes.
3. Pour the soaked saffron and its liquid into a deep bowl, then stir in the yoghurt, caraway seeds, and salt. Add the lamb and mix until all pieces are evenly coated. Marinate for about 30 minutes at room temperature.
4. Combine the almonds and the remaining boiling water in a bowl, soak for 10 minutes, then blend into a smooth paste. Set aside.
5. Heat the ghee over moderate heat in a heavy casserole until hot. Add cinnamon, cardamom, and cloves, stirring for a minute or two.
6. Add onions, garlic, and ginger to the pan. Fry, lifting and turning constantly, until onions are soft and golden brown.
7. Using a slotted spoon, remove the lamb from the marinade and add it to the casserole. Stir over moderate heat until it browns evenly.
8. Pour in the almond puree and red pepper, then stir in the coconut milk. Bring to a boil and simmer partially covered for 20 minutes, or until the lamb is tender.
9. To serve, discard the cinnamon and cloves. Mound the lamb attractively on a heated platter and pour the sauce over it.
